concept_decisions.labels_compared: surveillance_measurement_designs vs burden_underascertainment_estimation, alternative_surveillance_modalities, surveillance_reporting_system_evaluation, diagnostic_ascertainment_improvement, spatiotemporal_risk_mapping, epidemic_forecasting_and_transmission_models, partially_observed_epidemic_methods, intervention_and_program_effect_evaluation, policy_and_response_frameworks, evidence_syntheses_on_surveillance_gaps
concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: Manifest metadata, single provisional concept row, and every title plus complete available abstract for all 150 assigned records.
concept_decisions.rationale: The provisional bucket is not semantically coherent. The slice contains distinct designs: hidden-burden estimation, nonroutine surveillance modalities, reporting-system audits, diagnostic ascertainment work, spatial hotspot analyses, epidemic modelling, inference methods for partially observed outbreaks, intervention evaluations, policy frameworks, and evidence syntheses. A vague surveillance catch-all cannot remain final.

new_concepts.rationale: For studies whose primary design estimates hidden incidence, mortality, prevalence, population size, or economic burden after correcting for under-reporting or missingness.

new_concepts.canonical_name: Alternative surveillance modalities and proxy indicator studies
new_concepts.rationale: For serosurveillance, wastewater, genomic, facility-proxy, participatory, bioarchive, or community-cohort designs used outside routine notification streams.

new_concepts.canonical_name: Surveillance reporting system evaluation and strengthening studies
new_concepts.rationale: For studies auditing reporting completeness, comparing data sources, critiquing surveillance infrastructure, or improving pharmacovigilance and occupational reporting workflows.

new_concepts.canonical_name: Diagnostic ascertainment and case-definition improvement studies
new_concepts.rationale: For studies where the main contribution is improved detection through better diagnostics, lab interpretation, or updated case definitions.

new_concepts.canonical_name: Spatiotemporal risk mapping and ecological hotspot analyses
new_concepts.rationale: For analyses centered on geographic clustering, movement, spatial spread, or ecological correlates of transmission risk.

new_concepts.canonical_name: Epidemic forecasting and transmission modelling studies
new_concepts.rationale: For applied models forecasting epidemic trajectories or quantifying hidden transmission, transmission potential, or intervention effects.

new_concepts.canonical_name: Methods for inference under under-reporting and partial observation
new_concepts.rationale: For methodological papers developing inference machinery for noisy, delayed, zero-inflated, or under-reported epidemic observations.

new_concepts.canonical_name: Intervention and program effect evaluation studies
new_concepts.rationale: For empirical or model-based designs estimating effects of vaccines, NPIs, containment measures, or quality-improvement programs.
For papers that primarily formulate governance, preparedness, containment, or response recommendations rather than estimating a specific effect.

new_concepts.canonical_name: Evidence syntheses on epidemiology, surveillance gaps, and burden
new_concepts.rationale: For systematic, scoping, or narrative reviews synthesizing burden, epidemiology, and surveillance limitations without a new primary surveillance dataset.

concerns: One duplicate candidate appeared during manual assembly and was resolved semantically; final intended coverage is one reassignment per ordered candidate key.
